Lovely lavender roses, alstroemeria, larkspur, freesia, matsumoto asters and limonium are joined by light pink snapdragons, purple monte cassino asters and statice in an exclusive lavender vase. The bouquet will definitely steal the show. You might even steal someone's heart.Container and/ or color of container may vary.

Name: Lavish Love
Description: Lovely reds and pinks come together in this lavishly romantic anniversary gift. Sweetly sentimental, this combination of colors and flowers is a delightfully fresh way to say I love you. Radiant red roses and spray roses along with pretty in pink asiatic lilies are beautifully arranged in a stylish glass vase. It's a beautiful way to celebrate a romance that deepens with each passing year.

Name: Enchanted Cottage
Description: This magical bouquet will be at home in a cottage, a condo, a studio or an estate. It's so pretty it will be appreciated by all those lucky enough to receive it. Enchant someone today! White roses and spray roses, lavender stock and waxflower, all perfectly arranged in a clear glass vase that's wrapped with purple ribbon.

Name: Love and Laughter
Description: Know someone you love to make laugh? Someone you love to laugh with? Someone who could use a laugh? Someone who fits all of the above? Well, this beautiful arrangement has charms that extend way beyond its blossoms. Lavender roses and daisy spray chrysanthemums, purple carnations, miniature carnations, matsumoto asters and pink waxflower are delivered in a sweet lilac vase that's tied with a purple satin ribbon. Love, laugh and send it today!Color of vase may vary.

Name: Polka Dots and Posies
Description: Polka dots and posies, they're the perfect pair. Well, at least in this pretty arrangement they are. Just the right flowers in just the right vase all wrapped up in… you guessed it, just the right ribbon. Pink spray roses and white daisy spray chrysanthemums are delivered in an exclusive pink vase that's wrapped with a polka-dot satin ribbon.

Name: Heavenly & Harmony
Description: Heavenly hues and pretty petals are in perfect harmony in this gorgeous arrangement. Lovely for a birthday, anniversary or just because, it's simply stunning! Light pink roses, white asiatic lilies, Queen Anne's lace and salal are beautifully arranged in a glass vase. Heaven sent? Well, someone will think you're an angel for sending it!Style of vase may vary.

Name: Arrive In Style
Description: This beautiful bouquet will most certainly arrive in style! Ready for the runway, as it were. A delightful combination of light colors and lovely flowers, it's simply beautiful. Light pink roses, white asiatic lilies, alstroemeria, cushion spray chrysanthemums and statice are delivered in a stylish vase. Style to spare!

Name: Isle of White
Description: Like a vacation for the senses, this lovely bouquet delivers an oasis of beauty and elegance. Soothing, serene and very special. Crème roses, white asiatic lilies and stock stem are incredibly arranged in a bubble vase. When it comes to bouquets, this is definitely the right way to do white.

Name: Meet Me in Provence
Description: With a beauty reminiscent of the south of France, this proud and pretty arrangement holds nothing back. The colors, the flowers and the feeling of Provence are all present and accounted for in this wonderful bouquet. Yellow roses, spray roses and asiatic lilies, white spray roses and stock and the ever-delightful light blue delphinium are delivered in a vase. C'est magnifiqueStyle of vase may vary.

Name: Cupid's Creation
Description: Classic beauty and romance to spare, thanks to the graceful lines of a Couture Vase filled with stunning roses – the iconic flower of love. Like the arrow released from Cupid's bow, this gorgeous bouquet will go straight to your lover's heart. Exquisite red and pink roses, white and light pink spray roses and greens are perfectly arranged in a lovely vase. This is an inspired way to celebrate your love.Vase may vary.

Name: My Perfect Love
Description: When it comes to romance, the red rose rules! And when it comes to delivering romance in a big way, two dozen gorgeous red roses are a brilliant choice. Twenty-four stunning red roses are arranged with greenery and delivered in a feminine vase.

Name: Always on My Mind
Description: A dozen gorgeous red roses are the perfect romantic gift to send to the one who's always on your mind and in your heart. Say I love you by sending this lovely arrangement of twelve radiant red roses and fresh greens delivered in a beautiful spring garden vase. Love always.

Name: Never Let Go
Description: Let someone special know how much their love means to you by sending them this truly original arrangement. A vision in red with lavender accents, this beautiful gift is a poignant way to celebrate love that endures. 24 pretty red roses with lavender waxflower and greens are delivered in a stunning ruby red cube vase.

Name: Rose Classique
Description: Red roses have symbolized love and romance for centuries. One need only gaze at a classic red rose arrangement, like this one, to see why. Red roses are stunning, dramatic, and they say so much – without saying a word. A dozen red roses with garden greens are hand-delivered in a fashionable Couture Vase. Classic and romantic. Vase may vary.

Name: This Magic Moment
Description: It will be a magic moment when this divine bowl of pastel roses is hand-delivered to someone special. Perfect for any occasion, the soft colors and variety of rose blossoms will soothe anyone's soul. Beautiful yellow roses, peach and white spray roses and greens are delivered in a clear glass bubble ball. The effect is magical.

Name: Parisian Pinks
Description: Named after the most romantic city in the world, this pretty rose arrangement delivers romance ever so beautifully. Light pink roses symbolize femininity, elegance and refinement, especially when they are perfectly arranged in a white French country pot. Enchanting light pink roses and spray roses arranged with delicate Queen Anne's lace and greens are delivered in an exclusive ceramic container. C'est magnifique!Color and style of container may vary.

Name: Lavender Wishes
Description: Lovely lavender roses are enchanting and exotic. They can even signify love at first sight, and when this pretty bouquet is delivered it will surely be love. Gorgeous as the roses are by themselves, when mixed with the dark forest green of eucalyptus the effect is intoxicating. Twelve delightful lavender roses, eucalyptus and greens are delivered in a glass vase. It's a wish come true!

Name: Sweet Moments
Description: Know someone who needs a lift? Brighten their day by sending this lovely bouquet of fresh flowers that has sweetness woven right in. Gorgeous white roses, purple alstroemeria, lavender waxflower and eucalyptus are perfectly arranged in a white basket.

Name: Morning Melody
Description: Shades of purple are in perfect harmony in this profoundly pretty arrangement. A lovely mix of classic and modern, ribbons and roses, it's sure to make someone's day! Lavender roses and waxflower, purple limonium and greens are hand-delivered in a lavender cube that's all wrapped up with a vibrant purple taffeta ribbon. Vase may vary.

Name: Victorian Romance
Description: Romance blossoms beautifully within this elegant bouquet. The serenity and innocence of cream-colored roses is in delightful juxtaposition with lavender waxflower and fresh ivy greens. It's as romantic as a stroll through the English countryside. A dozen crème roses, lavender waxflower and ivy are perfectly arranged in a glass vase.

Name: Rosy Glow Bouquet
Description: Yellow roses symbolize friendship, and sending this sunny bouquet of bright yellow flowers is such a beautiful way to celebrate a special bond. Destined to make anyone's day glow, these roses are brilliant! Glowing yellow roses and solidago mixed with greens are delivered in a clear glass gathering vase. Sunny skies ahead!

Name: Blossoms in Vogue
Description: Blow someone away with a bouquet that has so much style… all it needs is its own runway. Brilliant green hydrangea, hot pink and bi-color roses, hot pink and yellow spray roses and greens are hand-delivered in stunning style: a wide cylinder vase that's been elegantly lined with leaves. This bouquet is a singular sensation!

Name: Always a Lady
Description: A gift like this one is always appreciated. An eye-catching display of roses and lilies is perfectly arranged in a feminine vase which makes a beautiful and lasting impression. Elegant white roses and sweet pink asiatic lilies are hand-arranged with greens. It's the perfect way to show you love her always and forever.

Name: Isn't It Romantic
Description: Tonight will certainly be romantic if you send this classic arrangement today! Beautiful hues and gorgeous blossoms will deliver your love. A stunning arrangement of light pink roses, white roses, lilies, lisianthius and sweet pea, plus pink stock make this one of our most desired selections.

Name: Delicate Dozen
Description: As soft and delicate as the first blush of love, this rose bouquet carries a lot of romance. Gorgeous sweet pink roses arranged in a clear glass vase sends such a beautiful message of love, it just might leave you and your love blushing.

Name: Madly in Love
Description: If you're crazy about someone and not afraid to show it, this bright jewel-toned arrangement is the perfect way to express your love. Lavender, red and hot pink roses along with coral and red spray roses arranged in a red-hot cube vase are an absolutely beautiful way to get your message across.

Name: Life Celebration Casket Spray
Description: The Life Celebration Casket Spray celebrates a the life of your loved one with Sunflowers, red roses, red carnations, yellow daisy Pompons, Solidago and a yellow satin bow. Only available for delivery to a funeral home.

Name: Stylish Garden
Description: Tall, lush and stylish are what come together with this array of hydrangea, asiatic lilies, larkspur, snapdragons, blue delphinium, Bells of Ireland, and hot pink spray roses arranged in a clear glass flared vase.

Name: Colorful Flower Basket Arrangement
Description: Colorful is bright and lively all-around centerpiece made in an whitewash handled basket that includes red carnations, dark pink Alstroemeria, green Kermit Pompons, Purple Statice and Baby's Breath for filler.

Name: Angelic Urn Flower Arrangement
Description: The Angelic Urn Arrangement is an all yellow arrangement of snapdragons rising behind a circle of spray roses, alstroemeria, cushion pompons surrounding the urn convey ascendancy, brightness, and elegance. *** Urn not included. ***

Name: Eternal Love Flower Urn Arrangement
Description: Eternal Splendor is a colorful urn arrangement with tall sides graduating down into a ring includes orange Asiatic lilies, viking pompons, peach hypericum, red spray roses, purple liatris, green miniature carnations. *** Urn not included. ***

Name: Yellow Spray Rose Bouquet
Description: The Yellow Spray Rose Bouquet is an all-around arrangement in a clear glass sweetheart vase that is filled with yellow spray roses and baby's breath.

Name: Gathered With Love Flower Arrangement
Description: The Gathered With Love Flower Arrangement are flowers that you might pick on stroll through a magical garden. This all-around, centerpiece arrangement includes pink snapdragons, burgundy carnations, pink miniature carnations, spray roses, purple liatris and waxflower.

Name: Harmonium Urn Arrangement
Description: Harmonium is a one-sided, flat front urn arrangement of purple larkspur, heather, purple alstroemeria and white spray roses which allows the urn to stand prominently in front. *** Urn not included. ***

Name: The Sweetest Touch
Description: An oasis of soft pastel shades is created from this one-sided vase flower arrangement of gerbera daisies, alstroemeria, pink roses, Queen Annes Lace and hypericum. Prominent colors are pastel shades of pink, green, white, yellow.

Name: Gerbera and Rose Bouquet
Description: The Gerbera and Rose Bouquet is a centerpiece in an clear glass bubble bowl that includes yellow gerbera daisies, red spray roses, yellow alstroemeria and solidago for filler.

Name: Precious Flower Cross
Description: The Precious Flower Cross is a soft and touching flower arrangement to honor the life of a loved one. This cross is made of standard pink carnations as background with a cascade of 18 red roses and a satin bow in the center.

Name: Eternal Splendor Urn Arrangement
Description: Eternal Splendor is a colorful urn arrangement with tall sides graduating down into a ring includes orange Asiatic lilies, viking pompons, peach hypericum, red spray roses, purple liatris, green miniature carnations. *** Urn not included. ***

Name: Orange Delight
Description: Orange Delight includes Asiatic lilies, orange alstroemeria, orange miniature carnations and peach hypericum in a clear class Jordan vase.

Name: Petal Splendor
Description: Petal Splendor is a centerpiece comes in a glass tropical vasefilled with lavender snapdragons, white alstroemeria, pink standard carnations, lavender daisy pompons.

Name: Forever in Pink Flower Cross
Description: The Forever in Pink Flower Cross is a cross of flowers consisting of 50 standard pink carnations as background and a snaking cascade from top to bottom of white and yellow roses with baby's breath.

Name: Forever In Our Heart
Description: Softness, tenderness and elegance are conveyed in Forever In Our Heart, an open heart flower arrangement filled with Asiatic lilies, carnations, spray roses, and Queen Anne's Lace blooms. Prominent flower colors are pink, white and green.

Name: Striking Elegance
Description: White hydrangea and white roses set against hot pink spray roses create contrast, beauty and grace in this glass cube vase centerpiece flower arrangement accented with hypericum. Prominent colors are contrasting colors of white and pink.

Name: Colorful Spirit Heart
Description: Honor a colorful spirit with a colorful flower heart. This is a generous solid heart filled an abundance of pink from gerbera daisies, hot pink spray roses, and pink carnations that blend and contrast with blue delphinium, white miniature carnations, white spray mums, lavender spider mums and statice.

Name: Bold and Beautiful Funeral Wreath
Description: The Bold and Beautiful Wreath features the striking color contrast of red and white. The red in this wreath comes from comes from red roses, red spray roses, and the white comes from white fugi mums, white cushions pompons, white montecasino for filler. The wreath includes a white satin bow at top center.

Name: Glory
Description: Glory is a large and generous floor basket standing approximately 2 feet wide by 2 1/2 feet hight. Glory comes in a plastic white hoop basket and includes stems Bells of Ireland, stems green Fugi Mums, stems yellow Gerbera Daisies, tems white standard Carnations, stems white daisy Pompons, stems white Montecasino, stems white Stock, and a white satin bow.

Name: Petals Surprise
Description: Petals Surprise is an all-around, centerpiece arrangement in a clear glass Ginger Vase that includes pink Asiatic lilies, pink spray roses, and pink alstroemeria.

Name: The Pastel Flower Basket
Description: The Pastel Flower Basket is a basket of harmonious pastel colors. This all-around arrangement comes in a brown handled basket and includes lavender fugi mums, green minature carnations, green daisy pompons, bells of ireland, purple alstroemeria, purple montecasino and limonium.

Name: Sunburst Wreath
Description: Orange gerbera daisies, sunflowers, and burgundy carnations burst like sunshine in this bright funeral wreath that radiates warmth and love. Yellow daisy pompons, solidage and statice fill and accentuate this flower arrangement. The prominent colors are the colors of sunshine: orange, yellow, red and purple.

Name: Pastel Harmony
Description: Pastel Harmony is a one-sided arrangement that harmoniously blends in soft colors of bue delphinium, lavender roses, lavender spider mums, alstroemeria, white miniature carnatio and white montecasino.

Name: Pretty Passion
Description: Pretty Passion is a centerpiece in a clear glass classic vase with pink larkspur, purple fugi mums, white roses, pink alstroemeria, hot pink minis, waxflower for filler.

Name: Always Remembered Flower Wreath
Description: The Always Remembered Flower Wreath has yellow carnations, stems yellow miniature carnations, stems orange spray roses as cascade on the left side of the wreath that finishes with a stylish yellow satin bow.

Name: Pretty in Pink Basket
Description: Pretty In Pink is an all-around, centerpiece arrangement that comes in a brown handled basket and includes pink carnations, lavender daisy pompons, hot pink matsumoto asters, pink spray roses, and waxflower for filler.

Name: Fresh
Description: Fresh is a one-sided arrangement vase arrangement that is pure, alive and fresh. Fresh comes in a slender vase and includes hot pink spray roses, montecasino and white daisy pompons.

Name: Bountiful
Description: Bountiful is a one sided arrangement made in a white handled basket and includes purple Larkspur, stems pink standard carnations, stems lavender Fugi Mums, stems lavender Roses, stems hot pink Spray Roses, stems white Alstroemeria, and purple statice and limonium for fillers. The prominent colors are pink, purple, lavender and white.

Name: The Happy Yellow Basket
Description: The Happy Yellow Basket is a basket of yellow flowers contrasted against some striking but subtle purple. This centerpiece is made in a brown handled basket that has yellow gerbera daisies, yellow standard carnations, yellow alstroemeria, purple daisy pompons, and yellow solidago and baby's breath for filler.

Name: Large Mixed Plant Dish Garden
Description: The large Mixed Plant Ceramic Dish Garden includes a variety of indoor foliage.

Name: Solemnity Casket Spray
Description: The Solemnity Casket Spray mourns the loss of your beloeved with white Football Mums, red carnations, red roses, white Iceburg Pompons Montecasino as filler and a white satin ribbon. The prominent colors of this casket spray are red and white.

Name: Mixed Plant Dish Garden
Description: Mixed Plant Ceramic Dish Garden includes a variety of indoor foliage.

Name: Eternal Light Standing Spray
Description: The Eternal Light Standing Spray gives the visual effect of a bright, warm yellow glow to honor your loved one. This oval shaped standing spray includes yellow snapdragons, yellow fugi mums, white alstroemeria, yellow roses, white cushion pompons, baby's breath for filler and a yellow satin bow in the center.

Name: Eternal Grace Casket Spray
Description: The Eternal Grace Casket Spray is a white and yellow casket spray to honor your beloved with white Football Mums, stems white standard Carnations, stems yellow Roses, white Iceburg or Cushion Pompons, Solidago for filler and a white satin bow.

Name: Life Salute Wreath
Description: The Life Tribute Wreath celeberates a life well lived with yellow carnations, pink carnations, purple fugi mums, red spray roses, white cushions, purple statice and montecasino for filler and a white stain bow placed at top center.

Name: The Patriot Flower Basket Arrangement
Description: This Patriot Flower Basket Arrangement is a red, white, and blue arrangement to honor the life of your beloved patriot. The red comes from red carnations and red miniature carnations, the white comes from white cushion pompons, and the blue comes from dark blue delphinium. The This patriotic arrangement sits in a whitewash handles basket and features a royal blue satin bow.

Name: Elegance Funeral Wreath
Description: The Elegant Funeral Wreath is a funeral wreath of three dozen roses: 12 pink, 12 white, 12 yellow topped with a pink satin bow placed in the bottom center.

Name: Memories in Pink
Description: The Memories in Pink Casket Spray evokes softness and tenderness and honors the eternal grace of your loved one. This casket sprays includes stems of purple Liatris, stems pink Snapdragons, stems of lavender standard Carnations, stems pink Asiatic Lilies, limonium as filler and a a pink satin bow.

Name: Life Celebration Spray
Description: The Life Celebration Spray is evokes boldness and color to celebrate a life well lived. This oval shaped standing spray includes fugi mums, red carnations, yellow roses, red alstroemeria, purple statice and yellow solidago for filler and is topped with a red satin bow in the center.

Name: Glimmer Spray
Description: The Glimmer Spray gives the visual effect of a glimmer and evokes the feeling of transcendence. This oval standing spray sits on an easel to include blue delphinium, white fugi mums, white spray roses, white alstroemeria, baby's breath for filler and a royal blue satin bow in the center.

Name: Lovingly Remembered Casket Spray
Description: The Lovingly Remembered Casket Spray lets you remember and honor your loved one with the warmth of pink and red roses. Adorn the casket with 24 stems red Roses and 24 Stems light pink Roses, decorative greens and a pink stain bow.

Name: A Light Shines Through Casket Spray
Description: A Light Shines Through Casket Spray is meant to symbolize the eternal light that can shine through the sad and mournful passing of your dearly departed loved one. This Casket Spray includes orange Gerbera Daisies, orange Asiatic Lilies, purple Larkspur, yellow Roses, green Kermit Pompons, purple Statice for filler and a yellow satin bow. The prominent colors are orange, yellow, green and purple.

Name: Simply Sweet Flower Arrangement
Description: Simply Sweet honors the sweetness, gentleness and tenderness of your loved one. This one sided arrangement is made in a paper mache container and includes pink snapdragons, fugi mums, pink carnations, white daisy pompons, baby's breath and a pink satin bow.

Name: Divinity Casket Spray
Description: The Divinity Casket Spray evokes peach, purity and the divine. This casket spray includes white Asiatic lilies, white spray roses, white roses and a white satin ribbon.

Name: Lily Surprise
Description: Lily Surprise is an centerpiece, all around arrangement, in a clear glass cylinder vase that includes orange Asiatic Lilies, yellow Roses, green Kermit Pompons, purple statice for filler. The orange Asiatic lilies make this arrangement pop!

Name: Blessings Bouquet
Description: The Blessing Bouquet is a on-sided arrangement made in a black flat basket square bowl to that includes white larkspur, white spray roses, white standard carnations, Bells of Ireland and a white Asiatic lily in the center.

Name: A Life Remembered
Description: A Life Remembered flower arrangement is a a soft and elegant way to remember a precious life. This one sided low and oblong basket flower arrangement is filled with stems of pink Snapdragons, pink Asiatic Lilies, hot pink standard carnations, stems white Daisy Pompons, stems lavender Cushion Pompons and purple Montecasino as filler. Colors of this flower arrangement are pink, hot pink, lavender, purple and white.

Name: Happiness Flower Basket
Description: The Happiness Flower Basket brings brings happiness and joy to the lucky recipient. This centerpiece comes in a brown handled basket filled with hot pink matsumoto asters, white alstroemeria, purple standard carnations, lavender daisy pompons and baby's breath for filler.

Name: Bedazzled
Description: The Bedazzled flower arrangement will let you dazzle them with beauty! This all centerpiece flower arrangement in clear glass tropical vase with stems lavender fugi mums, pink larkspur, bells of ireland, stems yellow cushion pompons, yellow spray roses and orange alstroemeria.

Name: Cheerful Flower Arrangement
Description: The Cheerful Flower Arrangement is just that, happy and cheerful. It's an all-around arrangement in a brown handled basket filled with pink Asiatic lilies, purple alstroemeria, red standard carnations, green miniature carnations and yellow statesman pompons.

Name: Lively Flower Arrangement
Description: Lively Flower Arrangements is a vibrant centerpiece arrangement in a clear glass cylinder vase that includes peach asiatic lilies and white alstroemeria.

Name: Bountiful Red Rose Spray
Description: The Bountiful Red Rose Spray a true expression of the deep love you hold for your departed loved one. This is an oval funeral spray on easel that keeps things very simple with a generous selection of 4 dozen stems of red roses and is adorned with a red satin bow in the center. This is a large spray that is approximately 3 feet high and over 2 feet wide.

Name: Orange Splash Bouquet
Description: Orange Splash Bouquet is a splash of color. This centerpiece is an all-around flower arrangement in a clear glass bubble bowl that includes orange asiatic lilies, red gerbera daisies, orange miniature carnations, and peach hypericum.

Name: A Touch Of Class
Description: Simplicity, elegance and class are conveyed in this all around centerpiece flower arrangement with yellow Gerbera Daisies, yellow roses, stems white Hydrangea and stems of green Hypericum.

Name: Abundant Rose Standing Spray
Description: The Abundant Rose Standing Spray keeps things simple to honor the life of your loved one with three dozen roses: 12 pink roses, 12 white roses, 12 yellow roses. This rose spray is then adorned with a white satin bow in the center.

Name: Calming Breeze
Description: Calm, soothing serenity is what this Calming Breeze blows in. This centerpiece is an all around arrangement made in a 5"x5"x5" glass cube vase filled with white hydrangea, stems white Roses, stems blue Delphinium, stems green Hypericum.

Name: Joyous Flower Arrangement
Description: The Joyous funeral flower arrangement finds hope in the loss of a loved one by joyously celebrating a life well lived. This one sided arrangement made comes in a white plastic hoop basket and includes orange snapdragons, yellow fugi mums, red carnations, solidago for filler and a yellow stain bow. This is a large arrangement approximately 3 feet high and 2 and 1/2 feet wide.

Name: Colorful Fireside Basket
Description: The Colorful Flower Arrangement bursts with color. This one-sided design to is generously filled with purple larkspur, lavender fugi mums, light blue delphinium, red gerbera daisies, yellow standard carnations, yellow viking pompons, purple montecasino and red hypericum in a fireside basket.

Name: Fresh Flower Arrangement
Description: Fresh Flower Arrangement is an around centerpiece that comes alive with yellow gerbaera daisies, blue iris, white alstroemeria, pink minature carnations and yellow solidago for filler. Fresh comes in a clear glass slender gathering vase.

Name: Sunshine Funeral Flower Arrangement
Description: Sunshine is a bright and hopeful one side funeral flower arrangement that comes in a white plastic hoop basket that includes yellow fugi mums, yellow carnations, yellow cushion pompons, yellow mini carnations, solidago for filler and a yellow satin bow.

Name: Classic Funeral Flower Basket
Description: The Classic Funeral Flower Basket is classic, timeless and elegant. This one sided table sympathy basket comes in a brown handled basket and includes red alstroemeria, orange snapdragons, red roses, stems pink mini carnations and waxflower for filler.

Name: Lavish Surprise
Description: Lavish Surprise is centerpiece clear glass cube vase filled with pink Asiatic lilies, yellow spray roses and limonium for filler.

Name: The Natural Flower Arrangement
Description: The Natural Flower Arrangement comes in a clear glass classic urn vase and includes stems light blue delphinium, pink snapdragons, pink spray roses, pink miniature carnations and pink waxflower.

Name: Splendid
Description: Splendid is centerpiece arrangement in whitewash handled basket to with yellow roses, pink spray roses, white daisy pompons, yellow cushion pompons, purple statice, lavender montecasino and lavender waxflower for filler.

Name: Simply Rose
Description: Nothing is more classic than a dozen red roses. One dozen red roses are presented as a one-sided arrangement with leather leaf and salal in a clear glass vase.

Name: Lush
Description: Lush is a centerpiece in a slender gathering vase that is filled with stems of alstroemeria.

Name: Red and White Bouquet
Description: The Red and White Bouquet is a one-sided arrangement in a clear glass ginger vase that includes white spray roses, red miniature carnations, and stems red hypericum.

Name: A Touch of Elegance
Description: A Touch of Elegance is a one sided arrangement made in that includes purple liatris, pink carnations, white fugi mums, yellow mini carns, white cushion pompons, purple montecasino and purple statice for filler and a white satin bow.

Name: Beaming Flower Arrangement
Description: Beaming is bright and happy arrangement that stands out. This one-sided arrangement in a white plastic hoop basket to include yellow fugi mums, red carnations, yellow cushion pompons, red miniature carnations and a yellow stain bow.

Name: Lily Surprise Flower Arrangement
Description: The Fresh Flower Arrangement is a one-sided flower arrangement in a clear glass classic urn vase filled with Asiatic lilies that are pink, peach, orange and white.

Name: Sun Splash
Description: Sunshine and warmth radiates from this large, one-side basket of sunflowers, yellow snapdragons, burgundy carnations, yellow roses, yelllow daisy pompons and solidago.

Name: Radiant Glow
Description: Radiant Glow is a large and bright one-side arrangement in a brown basket. The eye-catching colors that pop come from yellow Snapdragons, orange Gerbera Daisies, yellow Roses, red standard Carnations, butterscotch Pompons, yellow Solidago and purple Statice for filler.

Name: Serenity
Description: The Serenity flower basket arrangement is one-sided table arrangement in white handled basket to that is filled with white larkspur, white asiatic lilies, white carnations and white miniature carnations. This is a large basket arrangement that is about 1 and 1/2 feet high and 1 and 1/2 feet wide.

Name: Pretty Petals
Description: The Pretty Petals flower arrangement is a one sided table sympathy arrangement made in a white handled basket filled with a generous 2 dozen roses, 8 pink roses, 8 white roses, 8 yellow roses.

Name: Rose Radiance Flower Basket Arrangement
Description: Rose Radiance is about roses and more roses. Three dozen red roses generously fill this one sided table sympathy arrangement in a brown handled basket.

Name: Yellow Splash Basket
Description: The Yellow Splash basket is a one sided funeral table sympathy basket in a white handled basket to include white snapdragons, yellow fugi mums, yellow roses, yellow mini carns and solidago for filler.

Name: Yellow Rising
Description: Yellow Rising is a tall one-sided arrangement made in a black flat square bowl that has yellow snapdragons, yellow gerbera daisies, and yellow spray roses.

Name: Peace Lily
Description: The Peace Lily, also called a Spathiphyllum, comes in an 8" whitewash pot.

Name: Sweetest Memories
Description: Sweetest Standing Spray is an oval standing spray on an easel with stems light pink roses, stems hot pink Spray Roses, stems white Daisy Pompons,white Larkspur, white Fugi Mums, white Alstroemeria, blue Delphinium, white Montecasino and a white satin bow in the center.

Name: Memories Standing Spray
Description: The Memories Standing Spray evokes gentleness and purity. This oval shaped standing spray on easel include pink larkspur, white fugi mums, pink carnations, pink alstroemeria, pink roses, white cushion pompons, babys breath for filler and a pink satin bow in the center.

Name: Forever Loved Standing Spray
Description: Forever Loved Standing Spray evokes brightness, warmth and hope. This oval shaped standing spray on easel include white larkspur, red carnations, white spray roses, red miniature carnations, white cushion pompons, white montecasino for filler and a red satin bow in the center.

Name: Shimmering Light Standing Spray
Description: The Shimmering Light Standing spray is an oval standing spray that include pink larkspur, white fugi mums, pink carnations, red alstroemeria, red spray roses, white cushion pompons, babys breath for filler and a pink satin bow in the center. Color, light and warmth flow from this spray.

Name: Star Spangled Spray
Description: The Star Spangled Spray honors the life of a patriot. This oval shaped standing spray comes in patriotic colors of red, white and blue and includes red miniature carnations, red carnations, white larkspur, white spray roses, white cushion pompons, white montecasino and dark blue delphinium with a royal blue satin bow in the center.

Name: Yellow Tribute Standing Spray
Description: The Yellow Tribute Standing Spray evokes brightness, light and warmth. This spray is on an easel and includes yellow fugi mums, yellow roses, Orange Snapdragons, orange alstroemeria, white cushions, solidago for filler and a yellow satin bow in the center.

Name: Eternal Star Standing Spray
Description: The Eternal Star Standing Spray is an oval shaped standing spray that includes pink larkspur, white fugi mums, pink carnations, purple alstroemeria, pink spray roses, lavender daisy pompons and pink waxflower for filler and adorned with a pink stain bow in the center.

Name: Roseary
Description: Roseary is flower rosary made of 50 red spray roses. This is a powerful way for Catholics and all Christians to honor a honor a life of faithful devotion.
